title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: My mother was in the habit of singing while cooking.

questions.firstSentence: Nobody has cleaned the kitchen for days.
He wasn't experienced enough to lead the team.
The police are investigating the robbery.
questions.secondSentence: The robbery is (1) _________ by the police.

questions.firstSentence: She wanted to know if I had enjoyed the concert.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ if I had enjoyed the concert.

questions.firstSentence: In spite of being nervous, he spoke clearly.
This is the best film I've seen this year.
questions.secondSentence: I've (1) _________ a better film this year.
